description: PR adds a new function classify_transaction exceeding the size/complexity budget (>80 LOC, nesting depth >4, high cyclomatic complexity). lizard/radon flag it; the delta gate (post-diff vs base) blocks because the breach is INTRODUCED by this PR -> verdict=blocked reason=complexity_budget_exceeded. Gate is on the DELTA only — a pre-existing large file the PR merely edits is never blocked. Tunable in block_on; demote to advisory if CRB F1 regresses.
